description: Composition Green and red striped polo neck T-shirt with mustard and aqua blue accents, made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with a buttoned chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered logo on the left chest, and a vented hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash with warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron No dry cleaning Nothing exudes class and elegance as much as a Levi's polo neck T-shirt. Wear this exuberant piece to any off-duty event to look your stylish best. Pair this T-shirt with classic denims and suede shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
